policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="pci-audit-app-id" value="@{
      try {
        var auth = context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Authorization", string.Empty);
        if (auth.StartsWith("Bearer ")) {
          var parts = auth.Substring(7).Split('.');
          if (parts.Length == 3) {
            var padding = parts[1].Length % 4 == 0 ? 0 : 4 - parts[1].Length % 4;
            var decoded = System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString(
              Convert.FromBase64String(parts[1] + new string('=', padding)));
            var claims = Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject.Parse(decoded);
            return claims.Value("appid") ?? claims.Value("azp") ?? "unknown";
          }
        }
      } catch { }
      return "unknown";
    }" />

    
    
      @{
        return Newtonsoft.Json.JsonConvert.SerializeObject(new {
          // PCI DSS Req 10.3.1 required fields
          event_type        = "ACCESS_REQUEST",
          pci_requirement   = "PCI DSS v4.0 Req 10.2.1.1",
          timestamp         = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-timestamp"],
          user_id           = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-user-id"],
          app_id            = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-app-id"],
          subscription_id   = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-sub-id"],
          subscription_name = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-sub-name"],
          // PCI DSS Req 10.3.1 — originating IP
          client_ip         = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-client-ip"],
          // PCI DSS Req 10.3.1 — identity/component affected
          api               = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-api"],
          api_version       = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-api-version"],
          operation         = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-operation"],
          product           = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-product"],
          department        = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-department"],
          // PCI DSS Req 10.3.1 — resource affected (path NOT body)
          http_method       = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-method"],
          request_path      = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-path"],
          request_id        = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-request-id"],
          // Outcome is "initiated" at inbound; full outcome logged in outbound/on-error
          outcome           = "initiated",
          // Sentinel field — confirms this log was produced by PCI DSS audit policy
          pci_audit_policy  = true,
          // NEVER add request body, response body, Authorization header value, or PAN here
          _body_logged      = false
        });
      }

log-to-eventhub.expression: @{ var statusCode = context.Response.StatusCode; var outcome = statusCode < 400 ? "ACCESS_GRANTED" : (statusCode == 401 || statusCode == 403 ? "ACCESS_DENIED" : "REQUEST_ERROR"); var eventType = statusCode < 400 ? "ACCESS_GRANTED" : "ACCESS_DENIED"; return Newtonsoft.Json.JsonConvert.SerializeObject(new { event_type = eventType, pci_requirement = "PCI DSS v4.0 Req 10.2.1.1 / 10.2.1.4", timestamp = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o"), request_timestamp = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-timestamp"], user_id = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-user-id"], app_id = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-app-id"], subscription_id = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-sub-id"], client_ip = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-client-ip"], api = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-api"], operation = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-operation"], product = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-product"], department = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-department"], http_method = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-method"], request_path = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-path"], request_id = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-request-id"], outcome = outcome, http_status_code = statusCode, response_time_ms = context.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds, pci_audit_policy = true, _body_logged = false }); }

@{ return Newtonsoft.Json.JsonConvert.SerializeObject(new { event_type = "AUTHZ_FAILURE", pci_requirement = "PCI DSS v4.0 Req 10.2.1.2 / 10.2.1.4", timestamp = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o"), user_id = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-user-id"], subscription_id = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-sub-id"], client_ip = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-client-ip"], api = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-api"], request_path = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-path"], request_id = (string)context.Variables["pci-audit-request-id"], outcome = "AUTHZ_FAILURE", http_status_code = 403, pci_audit_policy = true, alert_on_repeat = true }); }
